description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a distressed, off-white painted wooden finish. The front features two framed glass doors with round wooden knobs, allowing visibility into the interior shelving. The top surface is flat and bordered by slightly protruding edges, suitable for placing decorative or functional items. The sides and back are solid wood panels, with the back showing simple vertical divisions. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy feet, and the overall design is reminiscent of vintage or farmhouse-style furniture. The glass panels in the doors add a touch of elegance and allow for display of stored items.
description: A vintage-style, off-white wooden cabinet with two glass-paneled doors and a flat top surface. Features distressed paint and round knobs for opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled doors with round knobs and interior shelving visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large vertical wood panels and no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, showing a solid wood panel.
